sEn: MusicGen is a single-stage language model that generates high-quality music from text or melody, outperforming baselines.
sZh: MusicGen 是一个单阶段语言模型，能从文本或旋律生成高质量音乐，性能优于基线模型。
absEn: We tackle the task of conditional music generation. We introduce MusicGen, a single Language Model (LM) that operates over several streams of compressed discrete music representation, i.e., tokens. Unlike prior work, MusicGen is comprised of a single-stage transformer LM together with efficient token interleaving patterns, which eliminates the need for cascading several models, e.g., hierarchically or upsampling. Following this approach, we demonstrate how MusicGen can generate high-quality samples, both mono and stereo, while being conditioned on textual description or melodic features, allowing better controls over the generated output. We conduct extensive empirical evaluation, considering both automatic and human studies, showing the proposed approach is superior to the evaluated baselines on a standard text-to-music benchmark. Through ablation studies, we shed light over the importance of each of the components comprising MusicGen. Music samples, code, and models are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft
absZh: 我们解决了条件音乐生成的任务。我们引入了 MusicGen，这是一个单一的语言模型（LM），它处理多个压缩离散音乐表示流，即 token。与先前的工作不同，MusicGen 由一个单阶段 transformer LM 和高效的 token 交错模式组成，从而消除了级联多个模型（例如分层或上采样）的需要。通过这种方法，我们展示了 MusicGen 如何生成高质量的样本，包括单声道和立体声，同时以文本描述或旋律特征为条件，从而更好地控制生成的输出。我们进行了广泛的实证评估，包括自动和人工研究，表明所提出的方法在标准文本到音乐基准测试中优于评估的基线。通过消融研究，我们揭示了 MusicGen 每个组成部分的重要性。音乐样本、代码和模型可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft 获取。

contrib.en: Introduces MusicGen, a single-stage transformer LM with efficient token interleaving patterns for high-quality music generation.
contrib.zh: 提出MusicGen，一种单阶段Transformer语言模型，结合高效词元交错模式，用于高质量音乐生成。

contrib.en: Demonstrates text and melody conditioning in a single model, enabling better control over generated music.
contrib.zh: 在单一模型中实现文本与旋律条件控制，增强对生成音乐的控制能力。

contrib.en: Proposes a general framework for modeling multiple parallel streams of acoustic tokens via codebook interleaving patterns.
contrib.zh: 提出通过码本交错模式建模多并行声学词元流的通用框架。

contrib.en: Extends generation to stereo audio without extra computational cost using codebook patterns.
contrib.zh: 利用码本模式将生成扩展到立体声音频，且不增加额外计算成本。

contrib.en: Achieves superior performance over baselines on MusicCaps benchmark in human evaluation.
contrib.zh: 在MusicCaps基准上的人类评估中，性能优于基线方法。

contrib.en: Provides extensive ablation studies on codebook patterns, model sizes, and conditioning methods.
contrib.zh: 对码本模式、模型规模和条件方法进行了广泛的消融研究。

limits.en: Lacks fine-grained control over generation adherence to conditioning, relying mostly on classifier-free guidance.
limits.zh: 缺乏对生成结果与条件一致性的精细控制，主要依赖无分类器引导。

limits.en: Melody conditioning uses unsupervised chromagram, which may not capture complex harmonic structures.
limits.zh: 旋律条件使用无监督色度图，可能无法捕捉复杂的和声结构。

limits.en: Training data is limited to licensed music with potential lack of diversity, e.g., overrepresentation of Western music.
limits.zh: 训练数据仅限于授权音乐，可能存在多样性不足，例如西方音乐占比过高。

limits.en: Model may memorize training examples, raising concerns about originality and copyright.
limits.zh: 模型可能记忆训练样本，引发原创性和版权方面的担忧。

limits.en: Evaluation on MusicCaps may be biased due to noisy samples in the dataset.
limits.zh: 在MusicCaps上的评估可能因数据集中的噪声样本而产生偏差。

items.en: We tackle the task of conditional music generation. We introduce MusicGen, a single Language Model (LM) that operates over several streams of compressed discrete music representation, i.e., tokens. Unlike prior work, MusicGen is comprised of a single-stage transformer LM together with efficient token interleaving patterns, which eliminates the need for cascading several models, e.g., hierarchically or upsampling. Following this approach, we demonstrate how MusicGen can generate high-quality samples, both mono and stereo, while being conditioned on textual description or melodic features, allowing better controls over the generated output. We conduct extensive empirical evaluation, considering both automatic and human studies, showing the proposed approach is superior to the evaluated baselines on a standard text-to-music benchmark. Through ablation studies, we shed light over the importance of each of the components comprising MusicGen. Music samples, code, and models are available at github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft.
items.zh: 我们研究条件音乐生成任务。我们提出 MusicGen，这是一个单一语言模型（LM），它处理多个压缩离散音乐表示流（即 token）。与先前工作不同，MusicGen 由一个单阶段 Transformer LM 和高效的 token 交错模式组成，无需级联多个模型（例如分层或上采样）。通过这种方法，我们展示了 MusicGen 如何在文本描述或旋律特征条件下生成高质量的单声道和立体声样本，从而更好地控制生成输出。我们进行了广泛的实证评估，包括自动和人工研究，表明所提出的方法在标准文本到音乐基准上优于评估的基线。通过消融研究，我们揭示了 MusicGen 各组成部分的重要性。音乐样本、代码和模型可在 github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft 获取。

items.en: Text-to-music is the task of generating musical pieces given text descriptions, e.g., “90s rock song with a guitar riff”. Generating music is a challenging task as it requires modeling long range sequences. Unlike speech, music requires the use of the full frequency spectrum (Müller, 2015). That means sampling the signal at a higher rate, i.e., the standard sampling rates of music recordings are 44.1 kHz or 48 kHz vs. 16 kHz for speech. Moreover, music contains harmonies and melodies from different instruments, which create complex structures. Human listeners are highly sensitive to disharmony (Fedorenko et al., 2012; Norman-Haignere et al., 2019), hence generating music does not leave a lot of room for making melodic errors. Lastly, the ability to control the generation process in a diverse set of methods, e.g., key, instruments, melody, genre, etc. is essential for music creators.
items.zh: 文本到音乐是根据文本描述（例如“带有吉他 riff 的 90 年代摇滚歌曲”）生成音乐片段的任务。生成音乐是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它需要建模长序列。与语音不同，音乐需要使用全频谱（Müller, 2015）。这意味着以更高的采样率对信号进行采样，即音乐录音的标准采样率为 44.1 kHz 或 48 kHz，而语音为 16 kHz。此外，音乐包含不同乐器的和声和旋律，形成复杂结构。人类听众对不和谐非常敏感（Fedorenko et al., 2012; Norman-Haignere et al., 2019），因此生成音乐在旋律错误方面没有太多余地。最后，能够以多种方法（如调性、乐器、旋律、流派等）控制生成过程对音乐创作者至关重要。

items.en: Recent advances in self-supervised audio representation learning (Balestriero et al., 2023), sequential modeling (Touvron et al., 2023), and audio synthesis (Tan et al., 2021) provide the conditions to develop such models. To make audio modeling more tractable, recent studies proposed representing audio signals as multiple streams of discrete tokens representing the same signal (Défossez et al., 2022). This allows both high-quality audio generation and effective audio modeling. However, this comes at the cost of jointly modeling several parallel dependent streams.
items.zh: 自监督音频表示学习（Balestriero et al., 2023）、序列建模（Touvron et al., 2023）和音频合成（Tan et al., 2021）的最新进展为开发此类模型提供了条件。为了使音频建模更易处理，最近的研究提出将音频信号表示为多个离散 token 流，这些 token 表示同一信号（Défossez et al., 2022）。这既实现了高质量音频生成，又实现了有效的音频建模。然而，代价是需要联合建模多个并行的依赖流。

items.en: Kharitonov et al. (2022); Kreuk et al. (2022) proposed modeling multi-streams of speech tokens in parallel following a delay approach, i.e., introduce offsets between the different streams. Agostinelli et al. (2023) proposed representing musical segments using multiple sequences of discrete tokens at different granularity and model them using a hierarchy of autoregressive models. In parallel, Donahue et al. (2023) follows a similar approach but for the task of singing to accompaniment generation. Recently, Wang et al. (2023) proposed tackling this problem in two stages: (i) modeling the first stream of tokens only; (ii) then, apply a post-network to jointly model the rest of the streams in a non-autoregressive manner.
items.zh: Kharitonov et al. (2022); Kreuk et al. (2022) 提出采用延迟方法并行建模多流语音 token，即在不同的流之间引入偏移。Agostinelli et al. (2023) 提出使用不同粒度的多个离散 token 序列表示音乐片段，并使用自回归模型的层次结构对其进行建模。同时，Donahue et al. (2023) 采用类似方法，但用于歌唱到伴奏生成任务。最近，Wang et al. (2023) 提出分两个阶段解决这个问题：（i）仅对第一个 token 流建模；（ii）然后应用后网络以非自回归方式联合建模其余流。

items.en: In this work, we introduce MusicGen, a simple and controllable music generation model, which is able to generate high-quality music given textual description. We propose a general framework for modeling multiple parallel streams of acoustic tokens, which serves as a generalization of previous studies (see Figure 1). We show how this framework allows to extend generation to stereo audio at no extra computational cost. To improve controllability of the generated samples, we additionally introduce unsupervised melody conditioning, which allows the model to generate music that matches a given harmonic and melodic structure. We conduct an extensive evaluation of MusicGen and show the proposed method is superior to the evaluated baselines by a large margin, with a subjective rating of 84.8 out of 100 for MusicGen against 80.5 for the best baseline. We additionally provide an ablation study which sheds light on the importance of each of the components on the overall model performance. Lastly, human evaluation suggests that MusicGen yields high quality samples which are better melodically aligned with a given harmonic structure, while adhering to a textual description.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出 MusicGen，一个简单且可控的音乐生成模型，能够根据文本描述生成高质量音乐。我们提出了一个通用框架来建模多个并行的声学 token 流，这是对先前研究的泛化（见图 1）。我们展示了该框架如何在不增加计算成本的情况下扩展到立体声音频生成。为了提高生成样本的可控性，我们还引入了无监督旋律条件，使模型能够生成与给定和声和旋律结构匹配的音乐。我们对 MusicGen 进行了广泛评估，表明所提出的方法以较大优势优于评估的基线，MusicGen 的主观评分为 84.8（满分 100），而最佳基线为 80.5。我们还提供了消融研究，揭示了各组成部分对整体模型性能的重要性。最后，人工评估表明，MusicGen 生成的样本质量高，在旋律上与给定的和声结构更一致，同时遵循文本描述。

items.en: Our contribution: (i) We introduce a simple and efficient model to generate high quality music at 32 kHz. We show that MusicGen can generate consistent music with a single-stage language model through an efficient codebook interleaving strategy. (ii) We present a single model to perform both text and melody-conditioned generation and demonstrate that the generated audio is coherent with the provided melody and faithful to the text conditioning information. (iii) We provide extensive objective and human evaluations on the key design choices behind our method.
items.zh: 我们的贡献：（i）我们引入了一个简单高效的模型，用于在 32 kHz 下生成高质量音乐。我们展示了 MusicGen 通过高效的码本交错策略，使用单阶段语言模型生成一致的音乐。（ii）我们提出了一个单一模型，用于执行文本和旋律条件生成，并证明生成的音频与提供的旋律一致，且忠实于文本条件信息。（iii）我们对我们方法的关键设计选择进行了广泛的客观和人工评估。

Each time step t1,t2,…,tnsubscript𝑡1subscript𝑡2…subscript𝑡𝑛t_{1},t_{2},\ldots,t_{n} is composed of 4 quantized values (corresponding to k1,…,k4subscript𝑘1…subscript𝑘4k_{1},\ldots,k_{4}). When doing autoregressive modelling, we can flatten or interleave them in various ways, resulting in a new sequence with 4 parallel streams and steps s1,s2,…,smsubscript𝑠1subscript𝑠2…subscript𝑠𝑚s_{1},s_{2},\ldots,s_{m}. items.en: MusicGen consists in an autoregressive transformer-based decoder (Vaswani et al., 2017), conditioned on a text or melody representation. The (language) model is over the quantized units from an EnCodec (Défossez et al., 2022) audio tokenizer, which provides high fidelity reconstruction from a low frame rate discrete representation. Compression models such as (Défossez et al., 2022; Zeghidour et al., 2021) employ Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) which results in several parallel streams. Under this setting, each stream is comprised of discrete tokens originating from different learned codebooks. Prior work, proposed several modeling strategies to handle this issue (Kharitonov et al., 2022; Agostinelli et al., 2023; Wang et al., 2023). In this work, we introduce a novel modeling framework, which generalizes to various codebook interleaving patterns, and we explore several variants. Through patterns, we can leverage the internal structure of the quantized audio tokens. Finally, MusicGen supports conditional generation based on either text or melody.
items.zh: MusicGen 由一个基于 Transformer 的自回归解码器（Vaswani et al., 2017）组成，该解码器以文本或旋律表示为条件。该（语言）模型基于来自 EnCodec（Défossez et al., 2022）音频分词器的量化单元，该分词器从低帧率离散表示提供高保真重建。诸如（Défossez et al., 2022; Zeghidour et al., 2021）之类的压缩模型采用残差向量量化（RVQ），产生多个并行流。在此设置下，每个流由来自不同学习码本的离散 token 组成。先前的工作提出了几种处理此问题的建模策略（Kharitonov et al., 2022; Agostinelli et al., 2023; Wang et al., 2023）。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个新颖的建模框架，该框架泛化到各种码本交错模式，并探索了几种变体。通过模式，我们可以利用量化音频 token 的内部结构。最后，MusicGen 支持基于文本或旋律的条件生成。

items.en: We use EnCodec (Défossez et al., 2022), a convolutional auto-encoder with a latent space quantized using Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) (Zeghidour et al., 2021), and an adversarial reconstruction loss. Given a reference audio random variable X∈d⋅fssuperscript⋅𝑑subscript𝑓𝑠𝑋absentX\in^{d\cdot f_{s}} with d𝑑d the audio duration and fssubscript𝑓𝑠f_{s} the sample rate, EnCodec encodes it into a continuous tensor with a frame rate fr≪fsmuch-less-thansubscript𝑓𝑟subscript𝑓𝑠f_{r}\ll f_{s}. This representation is then quantized into Q∈{1,…,M}d⋅fr×K𝑄superscript1…𝑀⋅𝑑subscript𝑓𝑟𝐾Q\in\{1,\ldots,M\}^{d\cdot f_{r}\times K}, with K𝐾K being the number of codebooks used in RVQ and M𝑀M being the codebook size. Notice, after quantization we are left with K𝐾K parallel discrete tokens sequences, each of length T=d⋅fr𝑇⋅𝑑subscript𝑓𝑟T=d\cdot f_{r}, representing the audio sample. In RVQ, each quantizer encodes the quantization error left by the previous quantizer, thus quantized values for different codebooks are in general not independent, and the first codebook is the most important one.
items.zh: 我们使用 EnCodec（Défossez et al., 2022），这是一个卷积自编码器，其潜在空间使用残差向量量化（RVQ）（Zeghidour et al., 2021）进行量化，并采用对抗性重建损失。给定参考音频随机变量 X∈d·fs，其中 d 是音频时长，fs 是采样率，EnCodec 将其编码为帧率 fr≪fs 的连续张量。然后，该表示被量化为 Q∈{1,…,M}d·fr×K，其中 K 是 RVQ 中使用的码本数量，M 是码本大小。注意，量化后我们得到 K 个并行的离散 token 序列，每个长度为 T=d·fr，表示音频样本。在 RVQ 中，每个量化器编码前一个量化器留下的量化误差，因此不同码本的量化值通常不是独立的，第一个码本最重要。

One solution would be to flatten out Q𝑄Q, thus taking S=d⋅fr⋅K𝑆⋅𝑑subscript𝑓𝑟𝐾S=d\cdot f_{r}\cdot K, e.g. first predicting the first codebook of the first time step, then the second codebook of the first time step, etc. Then, using eq. (1) and eq. (2), we could theoretically fit an exact model of the distribution of Q𝑄Q. The downside however is the increased complexity, with part of the gain coming from the lowest sample rate frsubscript𝑓𝑟f_{r} being lost.

For instance, MusicLM (Agostinelli et al., 2023) uses two models, one modeling the flattened first K/2𝐾2K/2 codebooks, and a second one the other K/2𝐾2K/2 flattened codebooks, conditioned on the decision of the first model. In that case, the number of autoregressive steps is still d​fr⋅K⋅𝑑subscript𝑓𝑟𝐾df_{r}\cdot K.

items.en: Arbitrary codebook interleaving patterns. In order to experiment with various such decompositions, and measure exactly the impact of using an inexact decomposition, we introduce codebook interleaving patterns. Let us consider Ω={(t,k):{1,…,d⋅fr},k∈{1,…,K}}Ωconditional-set𝑡𝑘1…⋅𝑑subscript𝑓𝑟𝑘1…𝐾\Omega=\{(t,k):\{1,\ldots,d\cdot f_{r}\},k\in\{1,\ldots,K\}\} be the set of all pairs of time steps and codebook indexes. A codebook pattern is a sequence P=(P0,P1,P2,…,PS)𝑃subscript𝑃0subscript𝑃1subscript𝑃2…subscript𝑃𝑆P=(P_{0},P_{1},P_{2},\ldots,P_{S}), with P0=∅subscript𝑃0P_{0}=\emptyset, and for all 0<s≤S0𝑠𝑆0<s\leq S, Ps⊂Ωsubscript𝑃𝑠ΩP_{s}\subset\Omega, such that P𝑃P is partition of ΩΩ\Omega. We model Q𝑄Q by predicting in parallel all the positions in Pssubscript𝑃𝑠P_{s}, conditionally on all the positions in P0,P1,…,Ps−1subscript𝑃0subscript𝑃1…subscript𝑃𝑠1P_{0},P_{1},\ldots,P_{s-1}. Pragmatically, we restrict ourselves to patterns where each codebook index appears at most once in any of the Pssubscript𝑃𝑠P_{s}.
items.zh: 任意码本交错模式。为了实验各种这样的分解，并精确测量使用不精确分解的影响，我们引入了码本交错模式。设 Ω={(t,k):{1,…,d·fr},k∈{1,…,K}} 是所有时间步和码本索引对的集合。码本模式是一个序列 P=(P0,P1,P2,…,PS)，其中 P0=∅，并且对于所有 0<s≤S，Ps⊂Ω，使得 P 是 Ω 的一个划分。我们通过并行预测 Ps 中的所有位置来建模 Q，条件是在 P0,P1,…,Ps-1 中的所有位置。实际上，我们限制模式使得每个码本索引在任何一个 Ps 中最多出现一次。

items.en: We can now easily define a number of decompositions, for instance the “parallel” pattern given by
items.zh: 我们现在可以轻松定义多种分解，例如“并行”模式由下式给出

items.en: It is also possible to introduce a “delay” between the codebooks, as in Kharitonov et al. (2022), e.g.,
items.zh: 也可以在码本之间引入“延迟”，如 Kharitonov et al. (2022) 所述，例如

items.en: Through empirical evaluations, we show the benefits and drawbacks of various codebook patterns, shedding light on the importance of exact modeling of the parallel codebook sequences.
items.zh: 通过实证评估，我们展示了各种码本模式的优缺点，揭示了精确建模并行码本序列的重要性。

items.en: Text conditioning. Given a textual description matching the input audio X𝑋X, we compute a conditioning tensor C∈TC×Dsuperscriptsubscript𝑇𝐶𝐷𝐶absentC\in^{T_{C}\times D} with D𝐷D being the inner dimension used in the autoregressive model. Generally, there are three main approaches for representing text for conditional audio generation. Kreuk et al. (2022) proposed using a pretrained text encoder, specifically T5 (Raffel et al., 2020). Chung et al. (2022) show that using instruct-based language models provide superior performance. Lastly, Agostinelli et al. (2023); Liu et al. (2023); Huang et al. (2023a); Sheffer and Adi (2023) claimed that joint text-audio representation, such as CLAP (Wu* et al., 2023), provides better-quality generations. We experiment with all of the above, respectively: T5 encoder, FLAN-T5, and CLAP.
items.zh: 文本条件。给定与输入音频X匹配的文本描述，我们计算条件张量C∈R^{T_C×D}，其中D是自回归模型中使用的内部维度。通常，有三种主要方法用于表示条件音频生成的文本。Kreuk等人（2022）提出使用预训练的文本编码器，特别是T5（Raffel等人，2020）。Chung等人（2022）表明，使用基于指令的语言模型可提供更优性能。最后，Agostinelli等人（2023）；Liu等人（2023）；Huang等人（2023a）；Sheffer和Adi（2023）声称，联合文本-音频表示（如CLAP（Wu*等人，2023））可生成更高质量的样本。我们分别对上述所有方法进行了实验：T5编码器、FLAN-T5和CLAP。

items.en: Melody conditioning. While text is the prominent approach in conditional generative models nowadays, a more natural approach for music is conditioning on a melodic structure from another audio track or even whistling or humming. Such an approach also allows for an iterative refinement of the model’s output. To support that, we experiment with controlling the melodic structure via jointly conditioning on the input’s chromagram and text description. In preliminary experiments, we observed that conditioning on the raw chromagram often led to reconstructing the original sample, resulting in overfitting. To reduce it, we introduce an information bottleneck by choosing the dominant time-frequency bin in each time step. While a similar capability was shown in Agostinelli et al. (2023), the authors used supervised proprietary data, which is tedious and costly to collect. In this work, we take an unsupervised approach, eliminating the requirement for supervised data.
items.zh: 旋律条件。虽然文本是当前条件生成模型的主要方法，但对于音乐而言，更自然的方式是基于另一音频轨道的旋律结构（甚至口哨或哼唱）进行条件生成。这种方法还允许对模型输出进行迭代优化。为此，我们通过联合条件于输入的色度图和文本描述来控制旋律结构。在初步实验中，我们观察到对原始色度图进行条件化常常导致重构原始样本，从而过拟合。为减少过拟合，我们通过在每个时间步选择主导时频bin来引入信息瓶颈。虽然Agostinelli等人（2023）展示了类似能力，但他们使用了监督专有数据，收集起来繁琐且昂贵。在本工作中，我们采用无监督方法，消除了对监督数据的需求。

items.en: Codebook projection and positional embedding. Given a codebook pattern, only some codebooks are present at each pattern step Pssubscript𝑃𝑠P_{s}. We retrieve from Q𝑄Q the values corresponding to the indices in Pssubscript𝑃𝑠P_{s}. As noted in Section 2.2, each codebook is present at most once in Pssubscript𝑃𝑠P_{s} or not at all. If it is present, we use a learned embedding table with N𝑁N entries and dimension D𝐷D to represent the associated value from Q𝑄Q. Otherwise, we use a special token indicating its absence. We sum the contribution from each codebook after this transformation. As P0=∅subscript𝑃0P_{0}=\emptyset, the first input is always the sum of all the special tokens. Finally, we sum a sinusoidal embedding to encode the current step s𝑠s (Vaswani et al., 2017).
items.zh: 码本投影和位置嵌入。给定一个码本模式，每个模式步骤P_s中仅存在部分码本。我们从Q中检索对应于P_s中索引的值。如第2.2节所述，每个码本在P_s中最多出现一次或不出现。如果出现，我们使用一个具有N个条目和维度D的学习嵌入表来表示Q中的对应值。否则，我们使用一个特殊标记表示其缺失。在此变换后，我们对每个码本的贡献求和。由于P_0=∅，第一个输入始终是所有特殊标记的和。最后，我们加上一个正弦位置嵌入来编码当前步骤s（Vaswani等人，2017）。

items.en: Transformer decoder. The input is fed into a transformer with L𝐿L layers and a dimension D𝐷D. Each layer consists of a causal self-attention block. We then use a cross-attention block that is fed with the conditioning signal C𝐶C. When using melody conditioning, we instead provide the conditioning tensor C𝐶C as a prefix to the transformer input. The layer ends with a fully connected block consisting of a linear layer from D𝐷D to 4⋅D⋅4𝐷4\cdot D channels, a ReLU, and a linear layer back to D𝐷D channels. The attention and fully connected blocks are wrapped with a residual skip connection. Layer normalization (Ba et al., 2016) is applied to each block before being summed with the residual skip connection (“pre-norm”).
items.zh: Transformer解码器。输入被送入一个具有L层和维度D的Transformer。每层包含一个因果自注意力块。然后我们使用一个交叉注意力块，该块接收条件信号C。当使用旋律条件时，我们将条件张量C作为前缀提供给Transformer输入。该层以一个全连接块结束，该块包含从D到4·D通道的线性层、ReLU和回到D通道的线性层。注意力和全连接块都包裹有残差跳跃连接。在每个块与残差跳跃连接相加之前应用层归一化（Ba等人，2016）（“预归一化”）。

items.en: Logits prediction. The output from the transformer decoder at pattern step Pssubscript𝑃𝑠P_{s} is transformed into logits prediction for the values of Q𝑄Q taken at the indices given by Ps+1subscript𝑃𝑠1P_{s+1}. Each codebook is present at most once in Ps+1subscript𝑃𝑠1P_{s+1}. If a codebook is present, the logits prediction is obtained by applying a codebook specific linear layer from D𝐷D channels to N𝑁N.
items.zh: Logits预测。Transformer解码器在模式步骤P_s的输出被转换为对Q在P_{s+1}给出的索引处取值的logits预测。每个码本在P_{s+1}中最多出现一次。如果码本出现，则通过应用从D通道到N的码本特定线性层获得logits预测。

items.en: Audio tokenization model. We use a non-causal five layers EnCodec model for 323232 kHz monophonic audio with a stride of 640640640, resulting in a frame rate of 505050 Hz, and an initial hidden size of 646464, doubling at each of the model’s five layers. The embeddings are quantized with a RVQ with four quantizers, each with a codebook size of 204820482048. We follow Défossez et al. (2022) to train the model on one-second audio segments cropped at random in the audio sequence.
items.zh: 音频分词模型。我们使用一个非因果的五层EnCodec模型，用于32 kHz单声道音频，步长为640，产生50 Hz的帧率，初始隐藏大小为64，在模型的五层中每层加倍。嵌入通过一个具有四个量化器的RVQ进行量化，每个量化器的码本大小为2048。我们遵循Défossez等人（2022）的方法，在音频序列中随机裁剪的一秒音频片段上训练模型。

items.en: Transformer model. We train autoregressive transformer models at different sizes: 300300300M, 1.51.51.5B, 3.33.33.3B parameters. We use a memory efficient Flash attention (Dao et al., 2022) from the xFormers package (Lefaudeux et al., 2022) to improve both speed and memory usage with long sequences. We study the impact of the size of the model in Section 4. We use the 300300300M-parameter model for all of our ablations. We train on 303030-second audio crops sampled at random from the full track. We train the models for 111M steps with the AdamW optimizer (Loshchilov and Hutter, 2017), a batch size of 192192192 examples, β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.95subscript𝛽20.95\beta_{2}=0.95, a decoupled weight decay of 0.10.10.1 and gradient clipping of 1.01.01.0. We further rely on D-Adaptation based automatic step-sizes (Defazio and Mishchenko, 2023) for the 300300300M model as it improves model convergence but showed no gain for the bigger models. We use a cosine learning rate schedule with a warmup of 400040004000 steps. Additionally, we use an exponential moving average with a decay of 0.990.990.99. We train the 300300300M, 1.51.51.5B and 3.33.33.3B parameter models, using respectively 323232, 646464 and 969696 GPUs, with mixed precision. More specifically, we use float16 as bfloat16 was leading to instabilities in our setup. Finally, for sampling, we employ top-k sampling (Fan et al., 2018) with keeping the top 250250250 tokens and a temperature of 1.01.01.0.
items.zh: Transformer模型。我们训练不同大小的自回归Transformer模型：300M、1.5B、3.3B参数。我们使用来自xFormers包（Lefaudeux等人，2022）的内存高效Flash注意力（Dao等人，2022），以提高长序列的速度和内存使用。我们在第4节中研究模型大小的影响。我们使用300M参数模型进行所有消融实验。我们在从完整曲目中随机采样的30秒音频片段上进行训练。我们使用AdamW优化器（Loshchilov和Hutter，2017）训练模型100万步，批量大小为192个样本，β1=0.9，β2=0.95，解耦权重衰减为0.1，梯度裁剪为1.0。对于300M模型，我们进一步依赖基于D-Adaptation的自动步长（Defazio和Mishchenko，2023），因为它改善了模型收敛性，但对更大模型没有增益。我们使用余弦学习率调度，预热4000步。此外，我们使用指数移动平均，衰减为0.99。我们分别使用32、64和96个GPU，以混合精度训练300M、1.5B和3.3B参数模型。具体来说，我们使用float16，因为bfloat16在我们的设置中导致不稳定。最后，对于采样，我们采用top-k采样（Fan等人，2018），保留前250个token，温度为1.0。

items.en: Text preprocessing. Kreuk et al. (2022) proposed a text normalization scheme, in which stop words are omitted and the remaining text is lemmatized. We denote this method by text-normalization. When considering musical datasets, additional annotations tags such as musical key, tempo, type of instruments, etc. are often available. We also experiment with concatenating such annotations to the text description. We denote this approach by condition-merging. Finally, we explored using word dropout as another text augmentation strategy. For the final models, we used condition-merging with a probability of 0.250.250.25. Upon merging, we apply a text description dropout with a probability of 0.50.50.5. We use a word dropout with a probability of 0.30.30.3 on the resulting text. A full comparison of the different text preprocessing strategies can be found in Table A.1.
items.zh: 文本预处理。Kreuk等人（2022）提出了一种文本规范化方案，其中省略停用词，并对剩余文本进行词形还原。我们将此方法称为text-normalization。当考虑音乐数据集时，通常还有额外的注释标签，如音乐调性、节奏、乐器类型等。我们还尝试将这些注释与文本描述拼接起来。我们将此方法称为condition-merging。最后，我们探索了使用词丢弃作为另一种文本增强策略。对于最终模型，我们以0.25的概率使用condition-merging。合并后，我们以0.5的概率应用文本描述丢弃。对结果文本以0.3的概率应用词丢弃。不同文本预处理策略的完整比较见表A.1。

items.en: Codebook patterns and conditioning. We use the “delay” interleaving pattern from Section 2.2, This translates 303030 seconds of audio into 150015001500 autoregressive steps. For text conditioning, we use the T5 (Raffel et al., 2020) text encoder, optionally with the addition of the melody conditioning presented in Section 2.3. We also experiment with FLAN-T5 (Chung et al., 2022), and CLAP (Wu* et al., 2023) and compare the performance of MusicGen using each of these text encoders in the Table A.1. For melody conditioning, we compute the chromagrams with a window size of 214superscript2142^{14} and a hop size of 212superscript2122^{12}. Using a large window prevents the model from recovering fine temporal details. We further quantize the chromagram by taking the argmax at each time step. We follow a similar approach to Kreuk et al. (2022) and implement classifier-free guidance when sampling from the model’s logits. Specifically, during training we drop the condition with a probability of 0.20.20.2 and during inference we use a guidance scale of 3.03.03.0.
items.zh: 码本模式和条件。我们使用第2.2节中的“延迟”交错模式，这将30秒音频转换为1500个自回归步骤。对于文本条件，我们使用T5（Raffel等人，2020）文本编码器，可选地添加第2.3节中介绍的旋律条件。我们还尝试了FLAN-T5（Chung等人，2022）和CLAP（Wu*等人，2023），并在表A.1中比较了使用每种文本编码器的MusicGen性能。对于旋律条件，我们计算色度图，窗口大小为2^14，跳跃大小为2^12。使用大窗口可防止模型恢复精细的时间细节。我们进一步通过在每个时间步取argmax来量化色度图。我们采用类似于Kreuk等人（2022）的方法，在从模型logits采样时实现无分类器引导。具体来说，在训练期间，我们以0.2的概率丢弃条件，在推理期间，我们使用3.0的引导尺度。

items.en: Training datasets. We use 20K hours of licensed music to train MusicGen. Specifically, we rely on an internal dataset of 10K high-quality music tracks, and on the ShutterStock and Pond5 music data collections111www.shutterstock.com/music and www.pond5.com with respectively 25K and 365K instrument-only music tracks. All datasets consist of full-length music sampled at 32 kHz with metadata composed of a textual description and information such as the genre, BPM, and tags. We downmix the audio to mono unless stated otherwise.
items.zh: 训练数据集。我们使用20K小时的授权音乐来训练MusicGen。具体来说，我们依赖一个包含10K高质量音乐轨道的内部数据集，以及ShutterStock和Pond5音乐数据集合（分别有25K和365K仅乐器音乐轨道）。所有数据集包含以32 kHz采样的全长音乐，元数据包括文本描述以及流派、BPM和标签等信息。除非另有说明，我们将音频下混为单声道。

items.en: Evaluation datasets. For the main results and comparison with prior work, we evaluate the proposed method on the MusicCaps benchmark (Agostinelli et al., 2023). MusicCaps is composed of 5.55.55.5K samples (ten-second long) prepared by expert musicians and a 111K subset balanced across genres. We report objective metrics on the unbalanced set, while we sample examples from the genre-balanced set for qualitative evaluations. For melody evaluation and the ablation studies, we use samples from an in-domain held out evaluation set of 528528528 music tracks, with no artist overlap with the training set.
items.zh: 评估数据集。对于主要结果和与先前工作的比较，我们在MusicCaps基准（Agostinelli等人，2023）上评估所提出的方法。MusicCaps由5.5K个样本（十秒长）组成，由专业音乐家准备，以及一个跨流派平衡的1K子集。我们在非平衡集上报告客观指标，同时从流派平衡集中采样示例进行定性评估。对于旋律评估和消融研究，我们使用来自域内保留评估集的528个音乐轨道样本，与训练集没有艺术家重叠。

items.en: Baselines. We compare MusicGen to two baselines for text-to-music generation: Riffusion (Forsgren and Martiros, ) and Mousai (Schneider et al., 2023). We use the open source Riffusion model to run inference 222Using riffusion-model-v1 from github.com/riffusion/riffusion-app (on May 10, 2023). For Mousai, we train a model using our dataset for a fair comparison, using the open source implementation provided by the authors333Implementation from github.com/archinetai/audio-diffusion-pytorch (March 2023). Additionally, when possible, we compare to MusicLM (Agostinelli et al., 2023) and Noise2Music (Huang et al., 2023b).
items.zh: 基线。我们将MusicGen与两个文本到音乐生成基线进行比较：Riffusion（Forsgren和Martiros）和Mousai（Schneider等人，2023）。我们使用开源Riffusion模型进行推理。对于Mousai，我们使用我们的数据集训练一个模型以进行公平比较，使用作者提供的开源实现。此外，在可能的情况下，我们与MusicLM（Agostinelli等人，2023）和Noise2Music（Huang等人，2023b）进行比较。

items.en: Evaluation metrics. We evaluate the proposed method using objective and subjective metrics. For the objective methods, we use three metrics: the Fréchet Audio Distance (FAD), the Kullback-Leiber Divergence (KL) and the CLAP score (CLAP). We report the FAD (Kilgour et al., 2018) using the official implementation in Tensorflow with the VGGish model 444github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/frechet_audio_distance. A low FAD score indicates the generated audio is plausible. Following Kreuk et al. (2022), we use a state-of-the-art audio classifier trained for classification on AudioSet (Koutini et al., 2021) to compute the KL-divergence over the probabilities of the labels between the original and the generated music. The generated music is expected to share similar concepts with the reference music when the KL is low. Last, the CLAP score (Wu* et al., 2023; Huang et al., 2023a) is computed between the track description and the generated audio to quantify audio-text alignment, using the official pretrained CLAP model 555https://github.com/LAION-AI/CLAP.
items.zh: 评估指标。我们使用客观和主观指标评估所提出的方法。对于客观方法，我们使用三个指标：Fréchet音频距离（FAD）、Kullback-Leiber散度（KL）和CLAP分数（CLAP）。我们使用Tensorflow中的官方实现和VGGish模型报告FAD（Kilgour等人，2018）。低FAD分数表示生成的音频是合理的。遵循Kreuk等人（2022），我们使用在AudioSet上训练的最先进音频分类器（Koutini等人，2021）来计算原始音乐和生成音乐之间标签概率的KL散度。当KL较低时，生成的音乐预计与参考音乐共享相似的概念。最后，CLAP分数（Wu*等人，2023；Huang等人，2023a）在轨道描述和生成音频之间计算，以量化音频-文本对齐，使用官方预训练的CLAP模型。

items.en: For the human studies, we follow the same setup as in Kreuk et al. (2022). We ask human raters to evaluate two aspects of the audio samples (i) overall quality (Ovl), and (ii) relevance to the text input (Rel). For the overall quality test, raters were asked to rate the perceptual quality of the provided samples in a range of 111 to 100100100. For the text relevance test, raters were asked to rate the match between audio and text on a scale of 111 to 100100100. Raters were recruited using the Amazon Mechanical Turk platform. We evaluate randomly sampled files, where each sample was evaluated by at least 555 raters. We use the CrowdMOS package666http://www.crowdmos.org/download/ to filter noisy annotations and outliers. We remove annotators who did not listen to the full recordings, annotators who rate the reference recordings less than 858585, and the rest of the recommended recipes from CrowdMOS (Ribeiro et al., 2011). For fairness, all samples are normalized at −1414{-}14dB LUFS (ITU-R, 2017).
items.zh: 对于人类研究，我们遵循与Kreuk等人（2022）相同的设置。我们要求人类评估者评估音频样本的两个方面：（i）整体质量（Ovl），和（ii）与文本输入的相关性（Rel）。对于整体质量测试，评估者被要求以1到100的范围对提供的样本的感知质量进行评分。对于文本相关性测试，评估者被要求以1到100的范围对音频和文本之间的匹配程度进行评分。评估者通过Amazon Mechanical Turk平台招募。我们评估随机抽样的文件，每个样本至少由5名评估者评估。我们使用CrowdMOS包过滤噪声注释和异常值。我们移除了未听完完整录音的注释者、对参考录音评分低于85的注释者，以及CrowdMOS推荐的其他食谱（Ribeiro等人，2011）。为公平起见，所有样本在-14 dB LUFS（ITU-R，2017）下归一化。

items.en: We start by presenting results of the proposed method on the task of text-to-music generation and compare MusicGen to prior work in the field. Next, we evaluate the ability of the proposed method to generate music conditioned on melodic features. We further show how to simply extend our codebook patterns for stereo audio generation. We conclude with an ablation study. Music samples, code, and models are available at github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft.
items.zh: 我们首先展示所提出方法在文本到音乐生成任务上的结果，并将MusicGen与该领域的先前工作进行比较。接下来，我们评估所提出方法在基于旋律特征生成音乐方面的能力。我们进一步展示如何简单扩展我们的码本模式以进行立体声音频生成。最后进行消融研究。音乐样本、代码和模型可在github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft获取。

items.en: Results suggest that MusicGen performs better than the evaluated baselines as evaluated by human listeners, both in terms of audio quality and adherence to the provided text description. Noise2Music performs the best in terms of FAD on MusicCaps, followed by MusicGen trained with text conditioning. Interestingly, adding a melody conditioning degrades the objective metrics, however, it does not significantly affect human ratings, while still being superior to the evaluated baselines.
items.zh: 结果表明，根据人类听众的评估，MusicGen在音频质量和与提供的文本描述的一致性方面均优于评估的基线。Noise2Music在MusicCaps上的FAD表现最佳，其次是使用文本条件训练的MusicGen。有趣的是，添加旋律条件会降低客观指标，但不会显著影响人类评分，同时仍优于评估的基线。

items.en: We notice that for the worst rated model, the FAD is correlated with the overall subjective rating, but it is not the case for the best rated models. We noticed that a large number of samples in MusicCaps (Agostinelli et al., 2023) contains a description stating that the recording is "noisy". It is possible that due to those noisy samples, improvements in the quality of the generated audio might deteriorate the FAD on MusicCaps once a certain quality threshold is achieved.
items.zh: 我们注意到，对于评分最差的模型，FAD与主观评分总体相关，但对于评分最好的模型则不然。我们注意到MusicCaps（Agostinelli等人，2023）中的大量样本包含描述，说明录音是“嘈杂的”。可能由于这些嘈杂样本，一旦达到一定质量阈值，生成音频质量的改进可能会恶化MusicCaps上的FAD。

items.en: We evaluate MusicGen, conditioned jointly on textual and melodic representations, using objective and subjective metric on the held out evaluation set. For the objective evaluation, we introduce a new metric: chroma cosine-similarity, which measures the average cosine-similarity between frames corresponding to the same time steps, taken from the quantized chroma of the reference and the generated samples. We evaluate using 100010001000 randomly sampled files from a held-out set. To better evaluate the relation between the conditioned melody to the generated music, we introduce another human study. To that end, we present human raters with a reference musical piece, followed by a set of generated pieces. For each generated sample, the listeners are asked to rate how well the melody of the generated piece matches that of the reference on a scale of 111 to 100100100. We use 404040 samples of 101010 seconds at random from the held-out set. Results are reported in Table 2. Results suggest that MusicGen trained with chromagram conditioning successfully generates music that follows a given melody. Thus, allowing for better control over the generated output. Interestingly, MusicGen is robust to dropping the chroma at inference time with both Ovl. and Rel. staying roughly the same.
items.zh: 我们在保留评估集上使用客观和主观指标评估联合条件于文本和旋律表示的MusicGen。对于客观评估，我们引入一个新指标：色度余弦相似度，它测量参考样本和生成样本的量化色度中对应相同时间步的帧之间的平均余弦相似度。我们使用从保留集中随机抽样的1000个文件进行评估。为了更好地评估条件旋律与生成音乐之间的关系，我们引入了另一项人类研究。为此，我们向人类评估者呈现一个参考音乐片段，然后是一组生成的片段。对于每个生成的样本，听众被要求以1到100的范围评估生成片段的旋律与参考片段的匹配程度。我们从保留集中随机使用40个10秒样本。结果报告在表2中。结果表明，使用色度图条件训练的MusicGen成功生成了遵循给定旋律的音乐。从而允许对生成输出进行更好的控制。有趣的是，MusicGen在推理时丢弃色度图时具有鲁棒性，Ovl和Rel基本保持不变。

items.en: We experiment with for extending generation to stereophonic data. We use the same EnCodec tokenizer, which we applied independently to the left and right channels, providing 2⋅K=8⋅2𝐾82\cdot K=8 codebooks per frame. Starting from a pre-trained monophonic MusicGen model, we fine tune it for 200K batches the same dataset with stereo audio. We reuse the “delay” pattern, with two possible variations: (i) “stereo delay” introduces a delay between the left and right channels for the same codebook level, while (ii) “stereo partial delay” apply the same delay to the left and right channel codebooks for a given level, as depicted in Figure 2(a). Note that using this simple strategy, we can generate stereo audio at no extra computational cost. We provide in Table 3 the subjective evaluations for those models. We notice that when downmixing the stereo output to mono, we are almost equivalent in perceived quality to a mono model. Stereo audio was overall rated higher than the mono counterpart, and the “stereo partial delay” benefits from a small boost both in overall quality and text relevance compared with the “stereo delay” pattern.
items.zh: 我们尝试将生成扩展到立体声数据。我们使用相同的EnCodec分词器，分别应用于左声道和右声道，每帧提供2·K=8个码本。从预训练的单声道MusicGen模型开始，我们在相同数据集上使用立体声音频微调200K批次。我们重用“延迟”模式，有两种可能的变体：（i）“立体声延迟”在相同码本级别的左右声道之间引入延迟，而（ii）“立体声部分延迟”对给定级别的左右声道码本应用相同的延迟，如图2(a)所示。注意，使用这种简单策略，我们可以在不增加额外计算成本的情况下生成立体声音频。我们在表3中提供了这些模型的主观评估。我们注意到，当将立体声输出下混为单声道时，我们在感知质量上几乎与单声道模型相当。立体声音频总体评分高于单声道，并且“立体声部分延迟”在整体质量和文本相关性方面相比“立体声延迟”模式略有提升。

items.capEn: (a) Visualizing codebook patterns for stereo models with two possible interleaving of the left (blue) and right (red) codebooks. For a given codebook index, the “stereo delay” pattern uses different delays for the left and right channels, while the “stereo partial delay” predicts the two channels in parallel.
items.capZh: (a) 立体声模型码本模式的可视化，展示了左（蓝色）和右（红色）码本的两种可能交错方式。对于给定的码本索引，“立体声延迟”模式对左右声道使用不同的延迟，而“立体声部分延迟”模式则并行预测两个声道。

items.capEn: (b) Memorization results for the first codebook tokens on 5-second audio generations, considering exact (solid line) and 80% partial (dashed line) matches when prompted with extracts of varying duration from the train set.
items.capZh: (b) 对5秒音频生成中第一个码本标记的记忆结果，考虑了使用训练集中不同时长片段进行提示时的精确匹配（实线）和80%部分匹配（虚线）。

items.en: This section provides an ablation study for the different codebook patterns, together with results for model scales and a memorization study. Additionally, we present results for different text augmentation strategies, text encoders, and audio tokenization models in Section A.2. All ablations are performed using 111K samples of 303030 seconds, randomly sampled from the held-out evaluation set.
items.zh: 本节提供了不同码本模式的消融研究，以及模型规模和记忆研究的结果。此外，我们在附录A.2中展示了不同文本增强策略、文本编码器和音频分词模型的结果。所有消融实验均使用从保留评估集中随机抽取的111K个30秒样本进行。

items.en: The effect of the codebook interleaving patterns. We evaluate various codebook patterns using the framework from Section 2.2, with K=4𝐾4K=4, given by the audio tokenization model. Table 1 reports results with the “delay” pattern. The “partial delay” consists in delaying by the same amount the codebooks 2, 3, and 4. The “parallel” pattern predicts all the codebooks from the same time step in parallel. The “coarse first” pattern first predicts codebook 1 for all steps, then predicts in parallel codebooks 2, 3, and 4. Thus, this pattern has twice the steps compared to other patterns. “Partial flattening” is similar, but instead of sampling first codebook 1 for all steps, it interleaves them with the parallel sampling of codebooks 2, 3, and 4. Finally, the “flattening” pattern consists in flattening all the codebooks, similar to MusicLM (Agostinelli et al., 2023). We report objective and subjective evaluations in Table 4. While flattening improves generation, it comes at a high computational cost and similar performance can be reached for a fraction of this cost using a simple delay approach.
items.zh: 码本交错模式的影响。我们使用第2.2节的框架评估了多种码本模式，其中K=4，由音频分词模型确定。表1报告了“延迟”模式的结果。“部分延迟”模式将码本2、3和4延迟相同的时间量。“并行”模式并行预测同一时间步的所有码本。“粗粒度优先”模式首先预测所有时间步的码本1，然后并行预测码本2、3和4。因此，该模式的步数是其他模式的两倍。“部分展平”模式类似，但不是先对所有时间步采样码本1，而是将其与码本2、3和4的并行采样交错进行。最后，“展平”模式将所有码本展平，类似于MusicLM（Agostinelli等人，2023）。我们在表4中报告了客观和主观评估结果。虽然展平提高了生成质量，但计算成本很高，而使用简单的延迟方法可以以较低的成本达到类似的性能。

items.en: The effect of model size. In Table 5 we report results for different model sizes, namely 300M, 1.5B, and 3.3B parameter models. As expected, scaling the model size results in better scores, however this comes at the expense of longer training and inference time. Regarding subjective evaluations, the overall quality is optimal at 1.5B, but a larger model can better understand the text prompt.
items.zh: 模型大小的影响。在表5中，我们报告了不同模型大小（即300M、1.5B和3.3B参数模型）的结果。正如预期，扩大模型规模会带来更好的分数，但这以更长的训练和推理时间为代价。在主观评估方面，1.5B模型的整体质量最佳，但更大的模型能更好地理解文本提示。

items.en: Memorization experiment. Following (Agostinelli et al., 2023), we analyze the memorization abilities of MusicGen. We only consider the first stream of codebooks from MusicGen as it contains the coarser-grain information. We randomly select N=20,000𝑁20000N=20,000 examples from our training set and for each one we feed the model with a prompt of EnCodec codebooks corresponding to the original audio and the conditioning information. We generate a continuation of 250 audio tokens (5 second-long audio) using greedy decoding. We report exact matches as the fraction of examples for which the generated audio tokens and source audio tokens are identical over the whole sequence. In addition, we report partial matches as the fraction of the training examples for which the generated and source sequences have at least 80%percent8080\% of the audio tokens matching. We present the memorization results for the different model sizes when varying the length of the audio prompt in Figure 2(b).
items.zh: 记忆实验。遵循（Agostinelli等人，2023），我们分析了MusicGen的记忆能力。我们仅考虑MusicGen的第一个码本流，因为它包含更粗粒度的信息。我们从训练集中随机选择N=20,000个样本，对于每个样本，我们向模型提供对应于原始音频的EnCodec码本提示和条件信息。我们使用贪心解码生成250个音频标记（5秒长音频）的延续。我们将精确匹配报告为生成的音频标记与源音频标记在整个序列上完全相同的样本比例。此外，我们将部分匹配报告为生成序列与源序列至少有80%的音频标记匹配的训练样本比例。我们在图2(b)中展示了不同模型大小在改变音频提示长度时的记忆结果。

items.en: Audio representation. In recent years, the prominent approach is to represent the music signals in a compressed representation, discrete or continuous, and apply a generative model on top of it. Lakhotia et al. (2021) proposed quantizing speech representation using k-means to construct speech language models. Recently, Défossez et al. (2022); Zeghidour et al. (2021) proposed to apply a VQ-VAE directly on the raw waveform using residual vector quantization. Later, several studies used such representation for text-to-audio generation. Next, we discuss the recent research in audio generation.
items.zh: 音频表示。近年来，主要方法是将音乐信号表示为压缩表示（离散或连续），并在其上应用生成模型。Lakhotia等人（2021）提出使用k-means对语音表示进行量化以构建语音语言模型。最近，Défossez等人（2022）；Zeghidour等人（2021）提出使用残差向量量化直接在原始波形上应用VQ-VAE。随后，多项研究使用这种表示进行文本到音频生成。接下来，我们讨论音频生成的最新研究。

items.en: Music generation. Music generation has been long studied under various setups. Dong et al. (2018) proposed a GAN-based approach for symbolic music generation. Bassan et al. (2022) proposed an unsupervised segmentation for symbolic music which can be later used for generation. Ycart et al. (2017) proposed modeling polyphonic music modeling using recurrent neural networks. Ji et al. (2020) conducted a comprehensive survey therein for deep learning methods for music generation.
items.zh: 音乐生成。音乐生成已在各种设置下得到长期研究。Dong等人（2018）提出了一种基于GAN的符号音乐生成方法。Bassan等人（2022）提出了一种用于符号音乐的无监督分割方法，该方法随后可用于生成。Ycart等人（2017）提出使用循环神经网络对复调音乐进行建模。Ji等人（2020）对深度学习方法在音乐生成中的应用进行了全面综述。

items.en: Dhariwal et al. (2020) proposed representing music samples in multiple streams of discrete representations using a hierarchical VQ-VAE. Next, two sparse transformers applied over the sequences to generate music. Gan et al. (2020) proposed generating music for a given video, while predicting its midi notes. Recently, Agostinelli et al. (2023) proposed representing music using multiple streams of “semantic tokens” and “acoustic tokens”. Then, they applied a cascade of transformer decoders conditioned on a textual-music joint representation (Huang et al., 2022). Donahue et al. (2023) followed a similar modeling approach, but for the task of singing-to-accompaniment generation.
items.zh: Dhariwal等人（2020）提出使用分层VQ-VAE将音乐样本表示为多个离散表示流。然后，两个稀疏Transformer应用于序列以生成音乐。Gan等人（2020）提出为给定视频生成音乐，同时预测其MIDI音符。最近，Agostinelli等人（2023）提出使用多个“语义标记”和“声学标记”流来表示音乐。然后，他们应用级联的Transformer解码器，以文本-音乐联合表示（Huang等人，2022）为条件。Donahue等人（2023）采用了类似的建模方法，但用于歌唱到伴奏生成任务。

items.en: An alternative approach is using diffusion models. Schneider et al. (2023); Huang et al. (2023b); Maina (2023); Forsgren and Martiros proposed using a latent diffusion model for the task of text-to-music. Schneider et al. (2023) proposed using diffusion models for both audio encoder-decoder and latent generation. Huang et al. (2023b) proposed a cascade of diffusion model to generate audio and gradually increase its sampling rate. Forsgren and Martiros proposed fine-tuning Stable Diffusion Rombach et al. (2022) using spectrograms to generate five-second segments, then, using image-to-image mapping and latent interpolation to generate long sequences.
items.zh: 另一种方法是使用扩散模型。Schneider等人（2023）；Huang等人（2023b）；Maina（2023）；Forsgren和Martiros提出使用潜在扩散模型进行文本到音乐任务。Schneider等人（2023）提出将扩散模型用于音频编码器-解码器和潜在生成。Huang等人（2023b）提出级联扩散模型以生成音频并逐步提高其采样率。Forsgren和Martiros提出使用频谱图微调Stable Diffusion（Rombach等人，2022）以生成五秒片段，然后使用图像到图像映射和潜在插值生成长序列。

items.en: Audio generation. Several studies were proposed for text-to-audio (environmental sounds) generation. Yang et al. (2022) proposed representing audio spectrograms using a VQ-VAE, then applying a discrete diffusion model conditioned on textual CLIP embeddings for the generation part (Radford et al., 2021). Kreuk et al. (2022) proposed applying a transformer language model over discrete audio representation, obtained by quantizing directly time-domain signals using EnCodec (Défossez et al., 2022). Sheffer and Adi (2023) followed a similar approach to Kreuk et al. (2022) for image-to-audio generation. Huang et al. (2023a); Liu et al. (2023) proposed using latent diffusion models for the task of text-to-audio, while extending it to various other tasks such as inpainting, image-to-audio, etc.
items.zh: 音频生成。多项研究针对文本到音频（环境声音）生成提出。Yang等人（2022）提出使用VQ-VAE表示音频频谱图，然后应用以文本CLIP嵌入为条件的离散扩散模型进行生成（Radford等人，2021）。Kreuk等人（2022）提出在离散音频表示上应用Transformer语言模型，该表示通过使用EnCodec（Défossez等人，2022）直接量化时域信号获得。Sheffer和Adi（2023）遵循与Kreuk等人（2022）类似的方法进行图像到音频生成。Huang等人（2023a）；Liu等人（2023）提出使用潜在扩散模型进行文本到音频任务，同时将其扩展到各种其他任务，如图像修复、图像到音频等。

items.en: We introduced MusicGen, a state-of-the-art single stage controllable music generation model that can be conditioned on text and melody. We demonstrated that simple codebook interleaving strategies can be used to achieve high quality generation, even in stereo, while reducing the number of autoregressive time steps compared to the flattening approach. We provided a comprehensive study of the impact of model sizes, conditioning methods, and text pre-processing techniques. We also introduced a simple chromagram-based conditioning for controlling the melody of the generated audio.
items.zh: 我们介绍了MusicGen，一个最先进的单阶段可控音乐生成模型，可以以文本和旋律为条件。我们证明了简单的码本交错策略可用于实现高质量生成，即使在立体声中，同时与展平方法相比减少了自回归时间步数。我们提供了模型大小、条件方法和文本预处理技术影响的全面研究。我们还引入了一种简单的基于色度图的条件方法，用于控制生成音频的旋律。

items.en: Limitations Our simple generation method does not allow us to have fine-grained control over adherence of the generation to the conditioning, we rely mostly on CF guidance. Also, while it is relatively straightforward to do data augmentation for text conditioning, conditioning on audio warrants further research on data augmentation, types and amount of guidance.
items.zh: 局限性 我们的简单生成方法不允许对生成与条件的符合程度进行细粒度控制，我们主要依赖CF引导。此外，虽然文本条件的数据增强相对直接，但音频条件需要进一步研究数据增强、引导的类型和数量。

items.en: Broader impact. Large scale generative models present ethical challenges. We first ensured that all the data we trained on was covered by legal agreements with the right holders, in particular through an agreement with ShutterStock. A second aspect is the potential lack of diversity in the dataset we used, which contains a larger proportion of western-style music. However, we believe the simplification we operate in this work, e.g., using a single stage language model and a reduced number of auto-regressive steps, can help broaden the applications to new datasets. Generative models can represent an unfair competition for artists, which is an open problem. Open research can ensure that all actors have equal access to these models. Through the development of more advanced controls, such as the melody conditioning we introduced, we hope that such models can become useful both to music amateurs and professionals.
items.zh: 更广泛的影响。大规模生成模型带来了伦理挑战。我们首先确保我们训练的所有数据都受到与权利持有人的法律协议覆盖，特别是通过与ShutterStock的协议。第二个方面是我们使用的数据集可能缺乏多样性，其中包含较大比例的西方风格音乐。然而，我们相信我们在本工作中进行的简化，例如使用单阶段语言模型和减少的自回归步数，有助于将应用扩展到新数据集。生成模型可能对艺术家构成不公平竞争，这是一个开放问题。开放研究可以确保所有参与者都能平等访问这些模型。通过开发更高级的控制，例如我们引入的旋律条件，我们希望此类模型能对音乐爱好者和专业人士都有用。

items.en: Authors note. This paper was submitted in the wake of the tragic terror attack perpetrated by Hamas on October 7, 2023, which has left the Israeli nation profoundly devastated. The assault greatly impacted us at a personal level, thereby significantly impacting the course of this research work. This paper was finalized while we grieve and mourn our friends and family, under great stress, with scientific considerations being the last thing on our minds. It may contain subtle errors.
items.zh: 作者注。本文是在2023年10月7日哈马斯实施的悲惨恐怖袭击之后提交的，该袭击使以色列民族深感悲痛。这次袭击在个人层面极大地影响了我们，从而显著影响了这项研究工作的进程。本文是在我们哀悼失去的朋友和家人、承受巨大压力、科学考虑已非首要之事的情况下完成的。它可能包含细微的错误。

items.en: In memory of the countless lives shattered by Hamas actions.
items.zh: 谨以此纪念被哈马斯行为摧毁的无数生命。
